# Validation Testing Instructions

- Confirm the system meets user needs and validation requirements (`VREQ-*`).
- Perform end-to-end validation in production-like environments when feasible.
- Involve stakeholders or end users where possible.
- Validate data integrity, workflows, and acceptance criteria.
- Record validation procedures and results using `VTC-*`, `VTP-*`, and `VTR-*` with evidence links.
